title: Will Caterpillar’s (CAT) PROPWR Deal to Add 2.1 GW Reshape Its Data Center Narrative
description:
Caterpillar recently entered a framework agreement with ProPetro’s PROPWR unit for up to 2.1 gigawatts of additional power-generation assets by 2031, expanding its role in powering data centers and energy-intensive industrial operations.
This move underscores how Caterpillar is increasingly tying its equipment and power solutions to the infrastructure demands of cloud computing, artificial intelligence, and traditional energy customers.
We’ll now examine how this long-term power-generation...
